testCases.notes: All required fields render. Form does NOT include a terms/conditions checkbox — the assertion expecting one is a generic spec mismatch with current product UI; no functional impact.
Personal account agent-test-031-002-1777987472@yopmail.com created, redirected to /successful-registration; subsequent login at /sign-in succeeds; account-button reads 'TestFirst TestLast'.
Org 'AGENT-TEST-Org-031-1777987528' created (orguser=agent-test-031-004-1777987528); redirect to /successful-registration.
Both Password and Confirm Password toggles flip type=password<->text; no console error.
Empty submit shows 5 'This field is required' inline errors; after filling First Name, 4 remain.
Max-length policy = 64 chars; 256-char input rejected with 'must not contain more than 64 characters'; form does not submit.
Empty Company-account submit shows 6 required-field errors (Company Name + 5 personal fields).
Duplicate email 'mutykovaelena@gmail.com' shows 'This email is already registered with us'. Note: no explicit login/reset suggestion — minor UX gap, not in scope of this case.

testCases.title: Validation - Email Format
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Each invalid format shows inline email validation error
testCases.notes: 'missing@domain' (no TLD) accepted by client-side validator — no format error shown. 'notanemail' and '@nodomain.com' correctly rejected with 'Enter a valid email address...'. Same root-cause class as BUG-012-001 from suite 012; preliminary, requires triage.
Mismatched confirm shows 'The password fields must have matching values'; form does not submit.
Policy enforced via static 'Tips' panel rather than dynamic per-rule errors. '123' rejected (multiple rules), 'alllowercase1!' rejected (no uppercase), 'ValidPass1!' accepted.

Account agent-test-031-013-1777987905 logged in immediately after registration without a verification step (current QA env: email verification disabled / 'without' mode). Post-registration page text suggests verification but is not enforced.

testCases.title: Email Verification - Optional
testCases.notes: requires_admin_config_change: optional email verification mode is not enabled in QA env (current state = disabled). Toggling needs platform Notifications/UserModule config; out-of-scope for a single autonomous test run.

testCases.title: Email Verification - Mandatory
testCases.notes: requires_admin_config_change: mandatory email verification mode is not enabled in QA env. Toggling needs platform Notifications/UserModule config.
Empty email + valid password shows 'This field is required' for the email field; form does not submit.
Generic 'Login attempt failed. Check your credentials' shown — no user enumeration leak. POST /connect/token returns 400.
Wrong password produces same generic message — same response as nonexistent user (no enumeration). POST /connect/token returns 400.

testCases.title: Login - Email Verification Required
testCases.notes: requires_admin_config_change: mandatory email verification not enabled in QA env (depends on AUTH-015 setup).

testCases.title: Login - Temporary Lockout
testCases.notes: missing_test_data: LOCKOUT_TEST_EMAIL/LOCKOUT_TEST_PASSWORD env vars are empty in .env. Cannot test with main test users to avoid self-lockout. Need a dedicated lockout user fixture in agent-user-pool.csv.

testCases.title: Login - Admin Blocked User
testCases.notes: missing_test_fixture: no admin-blocked user account is seeded in QA env. Requires admin to pre-block a user, then test login attempt. Out-of-scope for the storefront agent.

'Sign in with Entra ID' button visible on /sign-in. Click triggered redirect to login.microsoftonline.com (referrer captured in GA dr=https://login.microsoftonline.com/ and ep.method=external&ep.success=true). SSO completed silently with stored MS account; user logged in (account header showed an organisation+person string).

'Sign in with Google' button visible. Click redirected to https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/identifier with proper OAuth params (client_id, scope=openid+profile+email, redirect_uri=/signin-google, response_type=id_token). Did NOT complete auth (no test Google account); navigated back.

testCases.title: Login on Behalf - With Permission
testCases.notes: requires_manual_admin_test: 'Login on Behalf' is an Admin-SPA flow with cross-system side effects (auth context switch, downstream test contamination). CSV marks this Manual; reserved for an admin-credentialed run. Not executed in storefront-only autonomous run.

testCases.title: Login on Behalf - Org Maintainer
testCases.notes: requires_manual_admin_test: Org-maintainer impersonation also touches admin-side scopes and member directories; CSV marks Manual. Not executed in storefront-only autonomous run.

'Forgot your password?' link present on /sign-in; navigates to /forgot-password; email input + Submit visible; submission with valid email shows 'We sent you a reset password link to your inbox'; POST /graphql returns 200.
Same generic success message shown for non-existent email — no user-enumeration leak. POST /graphql returns 200 (same shape as valid email).
Login succeeds with UPPERCASE email (MUTYKOVAELENA@GMAIL.COM) and mixed-case (MuTyKoVaElEnA@GmAiL.cOm); both resolve to the same user. Account header shows the canonical name.

Documented behaviour: Password ' Password1! ' (leading + trailing spaces) NOT trimmed — login fails with 'Login attempt failed. Check your credentials'. Spaces-only password '  ' also rejected with same generic credentials error (sent to backend rather than client-side blocked). Form does not submit successfully in either case.

Apostrophe (O'Brien) and umlaut (Müller) preserved end-to-end: registration succeeds; login succeeds; account-button shows 'O'Brien Müller'; /account/profile First Name='O'Brien', Last Name='Müller', Email correct. No encoding artifacts.

HTML tags rejected: 'BoldName' / 'Test' produce "'First Name' contains invalid characters" + "'Last Name' contains invalid characters". HTML entities + img also rejected ('Test&Name', 'User'). Form does not submit. NameValidationPattern enforced.

Org name 'AGENT-TEST-AT&T Corp.-1777988413' accepted; registration succeeds; login succeeds; org name displayed verbatim in main-menu pill (ampersand preserved). OrganizationNameValidationPattern allows &.
Org name '<script>alert(1)</script>Org' rejected with "'Name' contains invalid characters"; form does not submit. OrganizationNameValidationPattern rejects <, > even though & is allowed.

bugs.title: Email format validator accepts addresses without TLD (e.g. user@domain) on /sign-up
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Each invalid format shows inline email validation error
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to /sign-up
2. Select Personal account (default)
3. Fill Email = 'missing@domain' (no TLD)
4. Click Sign up
bugs.expected: Inline email-format error 'Enter a valid email address...' shown for the Email field
bugs.actual: No format error shown for Email field. 'notanemail' and '@nodomain.com' are correctly rejected — only the no-TLD variant slips through.
bugs.crossRef: BUG-012-001 (suite 012) — same email validator class. Recommend consolidating.

createdEntities: agent-test-031-067-1777988413@yopmail.com + AGENT-TEST-AT&T Corp.-1777988413 (org admin, business chars)
cleanupNotes: Created entities are AGENT-TEST-* tagged for periodic cleanup via /qa-seed-data teardown. Storefront does not expose a self-delete; do not block run on cleanup.
